description: This file defines the API client for a food recipe web application. It provides functions to interact with backend endpoints, including user authentication, recipe management, favorites, shopping list, reviews, and administrative actions. The file employs TypeScript types for strong typing and includes default parameter handling for recipe search filters.

methods.name: function withDefaults(filters: RecipeSearchFilters): Required<Pick<RecipeSearchFilters, "page" |/ withDefaults
methods.description: Adds default page and pageSize values to recipe search filters.

methods.name: api.health
methods.description: Performs a health check of the environment.

methods.name: api.auth.register
methods.description: Registers a new user, returning tokens and user profile.

methods.name: api.auth.login
methods.description: Logs in a user, returning tokens and user profile.

methods.name: api.auth.me
methods.description: Fetches the current authenticated user's profile.

methods.name: api.recipes.search
methods.description: Searches recipes using various filters.

methods.name: api.recipes.getById
methods.description: Retrieves a full recipe by its ID.

methods.name: api.recipes.createMine
methods.description: Creates a new recipe authored by the current user.

methods.name: api.recipes.updateMine
methods.description: Updates a user's own recipe.

methods.name: api.recipes.deleteMine
methods.description: Deletes a user's own recipe.

methods.name: api.recipes.listMine
methods.description: Lists recipes created by the current user.

methods.name: api.favorites.list
methods.description: Lists the current user's favorite recipes.

methods.name: api.favorites.add
methods.description: Adds a recipe to favorites.

methods.name: api.favorites.remove
methods.description: Removes a recipe from favorites.

methods.name: api.shoppingList.get
methods.description: Retrieves the user's shopping list items.

methods.name: api.shoppingList.addFromRecipe
methods.description: Adds ingredients from a recipe to the shopping list.

methods.name: api.shoppingList.toggle
methods.description: Toggles the checked state of a shopping list item.

methods.name: api.shoppingList.remove
methods.description: Removes an item from the shopping list.

methods.name: api.shoppingList.clearChecked
methods.description: Clears all checked items from the shopping list.

methods.name: api.reviews.listForRecipe
methods.description: Lists reviews for a specific recipe.

methods.name: api.reviews.addForRecipe
methods.description: Adds a review for a recipe.

methods.name: api.reviews.deleteMine
methods.description: Deletes the current user's review.

methods.name: api.admin.listPendingReviews
methods.description: Lists reviews pending moderation.

methods.name: api.admin.moderateReview
methods.description: Approves or rejects a pending review.

methods.name: api.admin.listUsers
methods.description: Lists users for admin purposes.
